metadata.description: Community skills and plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: codex-plan-reviewer
plugins.description: Two-pass adversarial review of design documents and implementation plans using OpenAI Codex CLI

plugins.name: java-debugger
plugins.description: Debug Java code using JDI-based state inspection instead of System.out.println. Sets breakpoints, watchpoints, evaluates expressions, and returns structured JSON — all in 3-5 seconds.
